name_cn:
Premium Grade Replica Fendi
💗Iconic Baguette Medium Handbag, Grey Houndstooth Wool, with FF Embroidery
Pattern. Features matching leather details and FF buckle. Includes front flap, magnetic closure, lined interior pocket, zip pocket, and gold hardware. Bag comes with detachable handle and shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody.
Dimensions:27*6*15
Style 8600
